title: News
markdown:
Song of the moment: [Doing the Unstuck.](http://www.lyrics-top.com/181487-68670/Doing-The-Unstuck/Cure.html)


What a busy week so far. NaNoWriMo write in on monday, pumpkin carving at the UU, volunteering at the young democrats meeting, and today its FX. Tomorrow I’m at two halloween parties, Sunday is a group hike. No time to blog the details.
